text:
restrict enrollment to MA eligible individuals who, for 90 days or longer, have had or are 
expected to need the level of services provided in a long-term care (LTC) skilled nursing facility (SNF), a 
LTC nursing facility (NF), a SNF/NF, an intermediate care facility for individuals with intellectual 
disabilities (ICF/IDD), or an inpatient psychiatric facility. 

Additional details regarding I-SNP plans are available on the CMS website: 
https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Health-Plans/SpecialNeedsPla
